data.raceComments: {"comment":"6. FLY AWAY HOME failed to complete two back at Leopardstown but quickly atoned with a solid second in a Navan maiden hurdle over 4023m beaten 5L. Confidence restored and he looks the one to beat. Leading contender. 13. LOUIE'S FOLLY remains a maiden after ten starts yet shaped well when runner up in a course maiden tackling 3218m last time. Another bold bid is expected. 4. DOING IT IN STYLE struggled in two recent outings. Earlier form offers hope and a revival would not surprise. 1. BABYBURN was well held on debut tackling a Fairyhouse jumpers flat yet could know more now and improve into the placings.","runners":[6,13,4,1],"exclusive":false}
